data.title: Crypto community faces a sophisticated X account takeover using phishing to bypass passwords and 2FA, targeting X personalities' accounts.
data.description: A recent phishing scheme is targeting cryptocurrency figures, gaining unauthorized access to their X accounts. The campaign utilizes X's app authorization feature to evade passwords and two-factor authentication, making it difficult to detect.
Iran's Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Baghaei Declares That U.S. Claims of Offering Diplomacy Are 'Simply Disingenuous and Preposterous' .

data.title: In 2025, a variety of businesses, including coffee shops and airlines, are accepting Bitcoin, Ether, and XRP for transactions.
data.description: In the year 2025, the transition to digital forms of payment for daily shopping, travel, and luxury items is accelerating. Cryptocurrencies such as BTC, ETH, and XRP are gaining widespread acceptance for transactions. By 2025, an increasing number of retailers, travel companies, and luxury brands are now allowing customers to pay using these digital currencies. This shift indicates the growing mainstream adoption of cryptocurrencies as viable payment options in various sectors.

data.title: Valmet to pay EUR 0.67 per share on Oct 7, 2025, second dividend instalment for 2024 financial year announced.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Valmet Oyj announced that the second instalment of the dividend for the 2024 financial year, totaling EUR 0.67 per share, has been approved by the Board of Directors. Shareholders can expect to receive this payment on October 7, 2025. This information was released at 12:45 p.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland.

IDF: ‘Earlier today, a failed launch was detected from the Gaza city area toward an Air Force combat helicopter. The helicopter was not hit, and there were no casualties in the incident. The helicopter continued its mission in support of the fighting forces in the area.’

data.title: RetinalGenix Technologies expands patent portfolio for remote monitoring, shaping future of disease care.
data.description: RetinalGenix Technologies has made significant progress in enhancing its patent portfolio for home and remote monitoring, a crucial step towards the evolution of ocular and systemic disease care. This advancement underscores the company's commitment to innovation and improving healthcare outcomes. The updated patent portfolio now includes a total of 15 patents, signaling a substantial increase in intellectual property protection. This move prepares RetinalGenix Technologies for the rapidly changing landscape of healthcare technology and positions them as a key player in the future of disease management.

data.title: Marginum's HIVEN® device for neurosurgery receives CE mark in record time, bringing cutting-edge tech to EU clinics.
data.description: Marginum, a company based in Kuopio, Finland, has recently acquired MDR certification for their latest innovation, the HIVEN® device. This pioneering technology is now available for clinical use in the European Union. This marks a significant milestone for Marginum as they introduce this first-of-a-kind device to the market.

data.description: In Mahwah, New Jersey on September 25, 2025, recent difficulties have underscored the significance of proactive planning for numerous families. This autumn, there will be two notable open house occasions held in light of these circumstances...

data.title: STEP Energy Services Ltd. gets $5.50 per share offer for complete acquisition from ARC Financial Corp.; offer extends to 100% shares.
data.description: STEP Energy Services Ltd. has recently shared that a non-binding offer has been received from ARC Financial Corp. The offer involves the potential acquisition of all the common shares of STEP not currently under ARC's ownership, at a price of $5.50 per share in cash. This purchase would cover 100% of the issued and outstanding shares held by entities outside of ARC's control. Additionally, it is specified that ARC already holds a significant portion of STEP's common shares, either directly or indirectly.

data.title: Lido DAO price hovers around $1.08 support, RSI at 39.13 indicating potential oversold conditions. Key levels in focus.
data.description: The Lido DAO is currently trading at $1.09, showing a decrease of 2.84% in value. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for LDO stands at 39.13, indicating potential oversold conditions. Traders are closely watching key support levels as they come into focus amid the market fluctuations.
